name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 24 Feb 2023
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with Maropost/PayPal Checkout integration where pending payments were not being released correctly."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with shipping cost calculations on the checkout where the system could time out without indication during calculations involving large quantities of a product. The system will now return a message at checkout informing the customer they need to reduce the item quantity and try again."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
